message:
refactor(abi): migrate remaining raw syscall calls to typed wrappers

Convert __sched_get_priority_max, __sched_get_priority_min, and
sem_clockwait from raw syscall1/syscall6 calls to typed sys_* wrappers
with proper error handling via set_abi_errno.

Clean up unused imports (syscall_result, syscall6).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
